title: Power Hungry Data Centers Are Driving Green Energy Demand | BloombergNEF
description: Data centers pursue net-zero through decarbonization with most relying on traditional green power procurement.
bodyText: By Jinghong Lyu, Senior Associate, Intelligent Mobility and Sisi Tang, China Research Manager, BloombergNEF Data center operators are actively decarbonizing their power-hungry facilities, driven by their net-zero commitments and emerging government regulations. While a few companies have ambitious goals for round-the-clock carbon-free power, or a direct connect with large-scale renewable energy plants, most are relying on traditional green power procurement to lower their carbon footprint.
